title: Belmar short-term rental ordinance introduced
raw_text: Ordinance 2026-07 was introduced to cap short-term rental permits in residential blocks and require annual renewal. Council members said the ordinance is under review and has not yet been adopted.
cleaned_text: Ordinance 2026-07 was introduced to cap short-term rental permits in residential blocks and require annual renewal. Council members said the ordinance is under review and has not yet been adopted.
